commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: And he said, The things which are impossible with men are possible with God. Irenaeus of Lyons It is also agreeable. for the Father is incomprehensible; but in regard to His love, and kindness, and as to His infinite power, even this He grants to those who love Him, that is, to see God, which thing the prophets did also predict. "For those things that are impossible with men, are possible with God. Wherefore also the Lord declares, "The things which are impossible with men, are possible with God.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content:
; who can be ignorant of it? Who also can be unaware that "the things which are impossible with men are possible with God? ".
And, "The things very difficult with men are easy with God."

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content: Our Saviour and Master Jesus Christ says, that "what is impossible with men is possible with God."

commentaries.author: Theophilus of Antioch
commentaries.content: But the power of God is shown in this, that, first of all, He creates out of nothing, according to His will, the things that are made. "For the things which are impossible with men are possible with God."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
